briefdescription.para: Child has terminated abnormally and did not create a core file.
Child has terminated abnormally and created a core file.
Signal generated by expiration of a timer set by timer_settime()
Signal generated by completion of an asynchronous I/O request.
Signal generated by arrival of a message on an empty message queue.

memberdef.argsstring: (int how, const sigset_t *ZRESTRICT set, sigset_t *ZRESTRICT oset)
memberdef.name: pthread_sigmask

memberdef.argsstring: (int sig, const struct sigaction *ZRESTRICT act, struct sigaction *ZRESTRICT oact)
memberdef.name: sigaction

memberdef.argsstring: (int how, const sigset_t *ZRESTRICT set, sigset_t *ZRESTRICT oset)
memberdef.name: sigprocmask

memberdef.argsstring: (pid_t pid, int sig, union sigval value)
memberdef.name: sigqueue

memberdef.argsstring: (const sigset_t *ZRESTRICT set, siginfo_t *ZRESTRICT info, const struct timespec *ZRESTRICT timeout)
memberdef.name: sigtimedwait
